body_txt: Alice (a tall person) is being attacked by Bob (a shorter person) and does one of two things:  This is more common in comedic situations, or other situations in which a humorous resolution is preferred to a merciless beatdown . This works best on characters who are attacking in panic or incoherent fury ( Tsunderes are the most likely candidates), since it holds them safe until they can cool down. It is less effective when Bob has enough presence of mind to realize that he can just hit Alice in the arm. Or duck under her hand. Or take advantage of the fact that legs tend to be longer than arms ... If you're looking for the webcomic of the same name, click here .
